results.title: EastEnders icons unrecognisable 30 years after soap’s groundbreaking storyline – can you guess who?
results.description: TWO EastEnders icons are looking unrecognisable these days, 30 years after the soap's groundbreaking storyline in 1996. The actors were part of one of the first same-sex romances and gay kisses on a mainstream British soap. Have you guessed who they are yet? It's none other than EastEnders legends Andrew Lynford and Mark Homer, who...

results.title: BBC’s Brexit and Gareth Southgate docs land level at 9pm
results.description: MONDAY: Brook Lapping’s political doc on par with Cardiff Productions’ examination of male mental health

results.title: Rohit Sharma, Hardik Pandya cleared, set to feature in India’s ODI series against Afghanistan
results.description: Rohit Sharma and Hardik Pandya have reportedly been cleared to play for India in the upcoming ODI series against Afghanistan.

results.title: Medicare rates will rise for some in State Health Plan
results.description: (Carolina Journal) – For North Carolina's older workers and retirees in the State Health Plan, rates on the Medicare Advantage plans will increase, the Board of Trustees says.

results.title: Former Midland cab company owner now steering through homelessness
results.description: 'You think it can't happen to you. Then one day, it does,' says Rick McGrath who had been living in an RV on Midland Bay Landing property
